summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Discord roleplay Game Master bot - all backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility
affected_selectors: Dialog components in Campaign, NPC, and Lore managers

passed_tests: GET /api/npcs?campaign_id= lists NPCs for a campaign
POST /api/gm/check resolves skill check with LLM narrative
Frontend: Dashboard page loads with sidebar navigation
Frontend: Campaigns page - create new campaign dialog works
Frontend: NPCs page - create NPC dialog works
Frontend: Lore page - create lore entry works
Frontend: Rules & Tone page - tone selector and rules form
Frontend: Event Log page with Journal and Recaps tabs
Frontend: Navigation between all pages works

success_percentage.llm_integration: 100% (GPT-5.2 working for skill checks and narrative generation)
